description: Style Note Pretty and stylish, this skirt from Gini and Jony will make your little princess the centre of attention. Paired with one of her favourite party tops and those cute little ballerina shoes, your little one is ready to steal the show. Product Details White layered skirt, has a soft satin elasticated waistband, a net outer layer with flaring tiers, ruffle detail at the origin of each tier and multiple layers of organza and satin with a soft cotton lining Material and Care Satin, organza, net and cotton lining Dry clean only
